DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT EVANS, ROBERT H. HEARING SET FOR SEP-25-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROBERT EVANS' DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUFFICIENT TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO PURSUE THE CLAIM AGAINST EVANS, WHO IS ALLEGED TO HAVE KNOWN ABOUT AND TO HAVE CONSPIRED WITH WONG IN THE ALLEGED FRAUDULENT SCHEME. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-11-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-25-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROBERT EVANS' MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS (C.C.P. SECTION 438(C)(1)(B)(II)+F). NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN TEN DAYS. PLAINTIFF'S FRAUD CLAIM IS BASED ON AFFIRMATIVE MISREPRESENTATIONS BY WONG AND IT APPEARS THAT PLAINTIFF MAY BE ABLE TO PLEAD FACTS THAT FORM A BASIS FOR EVANS BEING A CONSPIRATOR. HOWEVER, THE PRESENT ALLEGATIONS AS TO EVANS LACK SUFFICIENT DETAIL. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WONG, STANFORD K. WONG, JULYAN
